progress_summary: v1.4 PR 1 (ADEV-328 — pack registry architecture) shipped as #192 → 4cb0b09. v1.4 PR 2 (ADEV-329 — 5 language packs) shipped as #203 → 22c45cd. v1.4 PR 3 (ADEV-330 — pack-aware dispatch + api-dev adapters + kind:mobile branch) shipped as #207 → 29218da. v1.4 PR 4 (ADEV-334 — modern web bulk: 3 langs + 4 frameworks) shipped as #214 → 245ba47. v1.4 PR 5 (ADEV-335 — enterprise bulk) NOW IN FLIGHT on branch claude/adev-335-enterprise-bulk: 4 new language packs (java/csharp/kotlin/php) + 4 new framework packs (spring-java/dotnet-aspnet/spring-kotlin/laravel-php). java testRunner=mvn test buildCmd=mvn package lintCmd=mvn checkstyle:check frameworks=[spring-java]; csharp testRunner=dotnet test buildCmd=dotnet build lintCmd=dotnet format --verify-no-changes frameworks=[dotnet-aspnet]; kotlin testRunner=gradle test buildCmd=gradle build lintCmd=ktlint frameworks=[spring-kotlin]; php testRunner=phpunit buildCmd=composer install --no-dev lintCmd=phpcs frameworks=[laravel-php]. spring-java→java, dotnet-aspnet→csharp, spring-kotlin→kotlin, laravel-php→php. gen-stack-packs reports `20 pack(s), 20 coverage flag(s)` (was 12/12). gen-api-dev-adapters reports `12 language pack(s)` (was 8). Flag registry mirror grows to 112 flags (was 104). Equivalence tests in tests/stack-packs-real.test.js extended to cover all 12 languages + 8 frameworks (EXPECTED_TOTAL_PACKS auto-derives from array lengths). api-dev adapter test now asserts 12 entries + skip-frameworks for all 8 framework ids. pack-dispatch test extended to cover all 12 languages + all 8 frameworks return the parsed pack with kind=framework. Vitest 222/222 green. langRef docs each ~6KB; frameworkRef docs each ~5–6KB; all under the 50KB soft cap.

progress_table.label: Scope + 8-PR plan approved (incl. iOS pivot, distribution model)
Linear tickets ADEV-327..337 created and aligned with current scope
PR 1 — Architecture: schema, gen-stack-packs, auto-flag wiring, parity validator (ADEV-328)
PR 2 — Backfill 5 existing stacks as language packs + equivalence fixtures (ADEV-329 / #203 / 22c45cd)
PR 3 — deploy-ops dispatcher (runtime) + api-dev pack-read (codegen) + kind:mobile branch (ADEV-330 / #207 / 29218da)
PR 4 — Modern web bulk: elixir+bun+deno language packs + phoenix/remix/sveltekit/solid framework packs (ADEV-334 / #214 / 245ba47)
PR 5 — Enterprise bulk: java/csharp/kotlin/php language packs + spring-java/dotnet-aspnet/spring-kotlin/laravel-php framework packs (ADEV-335)
PR 6 — Apple/iOS/Swift pack + app-store adapter, release-checklist dispatch (ADEV-336)
PR 6.5 — Mobile bulk: kotlin-android + flutter + react-native-expo + play-store (ADEV-343)
PR 7 — Hosting adapters: railway, netlify, heroku, aws-amplify (ADEV-337)
PR 8 — Site /coverage page, v1.4 pill, 5 skill version bumps, release (ADEV-331)

key_decisions: Theme: pack registry replaces hardcoded stack tables in stack-forge / api-dev / deploy-ops / app-architect / migration-ops.
Each pack is skills/stack-forge/packs/<id>/pack.yml + references/*.md; kind ∈ { server | mobile | platform-adapter }.
Coverage flags auto-generated as skills.coverage.<pack-id>.enabled (server + mobile only; adapters don't get a flag). Default = true if status:stable, else false.
Distribution: bundle-everything via existing make-skills-zip.sh. Flags filter what stack-forge OFFERS, not what's downloaded. Keeps regulated/air-gapped installs working.

All of mobile ships in v1.4.0. Original plan deferred Android/Flutter/RN to v1.5 pending release-ops handling Play Store + EAS — release-ops landed in v1.3 (ADEV-308 Done 2026-05-08), opening the gate. PR 6 lands iOS first to dogfood kind: mobile dispatch; PR 6.5 (ADEV-343) brings Android + Flutter + React Native.
kind: mobile dispatch renders deploymentRef as a release checklist instead of executing commands. Output starts with explicit 'checklist-driven, not automated' notice.
Cloudflare stays the default platform after PR 3's dispatcher refactor; CF user output unchanged. Contract tests guard regressions.
Backfill (PR 2) ships snapshot equivalence fixtures so the 5 existing stacks produce byte-identical output to v1.2.
Only 5 skills version-bump 1.2.0 → 1.4.0 (stack-forge, api-dev, deploy-ops, app-architect, migration-ops). The other ~13 stay on 1.2.0.
Future option (v1.6+): split into opchain-core.zip + opchain-extras.zip if pack count crosses ~100 or refs get heavy. Document in CONTRIBUTING.md as guidance for pack authors.
PRs 4-7 parallelizable after PR 3 lands. PR 8 must merge last (badge count depends on final pack count).
ADEV-333 created in error during scope shift; cancelled as duplicate of ADEV-332. ADEV-332 repurposed as a rolling v1.4.x patch tracker (no fixed queue).

shipped_prs.summary: v1.4 PR 3 — pack-aware dispatch + api-dev adapters + mobile branch
v1.4 PR 4 — modern web bulk (elixir/bun/deno + phoenix/remix/sveltekit/solid)

user_preferences: Pulls scope INTO releases when it expands the value prop; comfortable with bigger releases when 8-PR sequencing is clear.
Asks sharp clarifying questions about user-visible mechanics (downloads vs. visibility, plugin pattern) before approving implementation.
Prefers 'show me the implementation plan' as a checkpoint before writing code.
Wants Linear kept current with the actual plan — re-aligns tickets when scope shifts.

next_actions: PR 5 (ADEV-335) is on branch claude/adev-335-enterprise-bulk and ready to commit + push + open. Diff: 8 new pack directories (4 language + 4 framework), extended tests in stack-packs-real / api-dev-adapters / pack-dispatch. Vitest 222/222. Open the PR; link ADEV-335; merge once CI green.

PR 6 (ADEV-336) Apple/iOS. New language pack `swift` + framework `swiftui` (kind=framework, language=swift) + mobile pack `ios-swiftui` (kind=mobile, mobilePlatform=ios) + deploy-target adapter `app-store`. iOS pack dispatches via the dispatchMobile() envelope shipped in PR 3.

PR 6.5 (ADEV-343) Android + Flutter + React Native: kotlin-android (kind=mobile, mobilePlatform=android), flutter (kind=mobile, mobilePlatform=flutter), react-native-expo (kind=mobile, mobilePlatform=react-native), play-store adapter.

PR 7 (ADEV-337) hosting adapters — deploy-target packs for railway/netlify/heroku/aws-amplify (no coverage flag emitted — deploy-targets are sub-selections). After this lands, getDispatchTarget on existing language/framework packs starts returning non-empty supportedPlatforms.

PR 8 (ADEV-331) the v1.4 release: /coverage page, v1.4 pill on homepage, version bump on the 5 changed skills (stack-forge, api-dev, deploy-ops, app-architect, migration-ops), CHANGELOG entry, prod deploy.
